visual_description: In a dimly lit, moody interior, two men are seated at a table, engaged in a serious conversation. The man on the left, who is larger and wearing a blue patterned short-sleeved shirt, is speaking animatedly. He gestures with his hands, pointing his finger as he talks. The man on the right, dressed in a dark jacket, listens intently, his gaze fixed on the speaker. In the background, the setting appears to be a casual eatery or bar, with another person partially visible behind them. A blackboard with some white writing is on the far left. The camera remains steady in a medium close-up, capturing the intensity of their interaction. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner of the frame. A man speaks in a low, conversational, and slightly conspiratorial tone, as if sharing a piece of gossip. His voice is calm but carries a sense of knowing amusement as he says, "是啊，现在数落陈哥，真的还发脾气" (Yeah, now they're criticizing Brother Chen, and he's really throwing a tantrum). The background is filled with the low, indistinct murmur of other people talking, creating the ambiance
